about: Two-to-four sentence summary shown in the whoami section. Describe your experience, strengths and what kind of work you enjoy. Keep it in first person.

projects.name: Project Name
projects.description: One or two sentences describing what the project does, the problem it solves and anything technically notable about it.

projects.name: Closed-Source Project
projects.description: Projects without public links are fine too — leave the links array empty.

experience.title: Job Title
bullets: Achievement or responsibility written as a past-tense bullet — what you built, the tech used and the measurable impact.
Another bullet. Aim for two to four per role.

experience.title: Previous Job Title
bullets: The hash is decorative (any short hex string); set "current": true only on the newest role — it highlights the timeline dot and adds the (HEAD → main) label.

contactCta.heading: Looking for a full-stack engineer?
contactCta.blurb: Short call-to-action paragraph shown next to the contact links.
